author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.5.0
body: # [4.5.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.4.2...v4.5.0) (2018-02-06) ### Bug Fixes * **connectRange:** use the same behaviour for currentRefinement in getMetadata ([algolia/react-instantsearch#923](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/923)) ([4bc88bd](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/4bc88bd)) * **connectToggle:** use currentRefinement in metadata instead of the label ([algolia/react-instantsearch#909](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/909)) ([3452131](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/3452131)) * **StarRatings:** always show the stars below ([algolia/react-instantsearch#929](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/929)) ([41f53c1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/41f53c1)) ### Features * **connectStateResults:** expose isSearchStalled ([algolia/react-instantsearch#933](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/933)) ([6c9b328](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/6c9b328))
